offensive_abilities.name: Enhanced Medicinal Tools
offensive_abilities.text: When attempting a Medicine check inside a medical wagon, you gain a +2 item bonus.

movement.name: the Speed of the slowest pulling creature

piloting_check.text: Driving Lore (DC 23) or Nature (DC 25 to DC 33 depending on the pulling creatures)

statistics.space: 10 feet long, 10 feet wide, 7 feet high

stat_block.text: Medical wagons are frequent sights near the battlefield. These wagons carry various mundane and magical medical supplies and are generally staffed by a medic. A small gurney is mounted in the back of the wagon for transporting personnel or for use as an emergency operating table.
